codeReview.summary: The worker correctly removed the empty fonts.css file and its import from index.css. The reasoning was sound: theme.css already defines font-family variables using system fonts (SF Pro, SF Mono) that don't require @font-face declarations, making the empty fonts.css file unnecessary. All verification steps were run successfully (type-check, lint, build).

summary: PASS - Feature correctly implemented. The empty fonts.css file was removed along with its import from index.css. Theme.css remains the single source of truth for font-family variables (--font-family and --font-family-mono). All expected behaviors were met: (1) fonts.css removed, (2) no orphan imports exist, (3) font variables in theme.css remain authoritative. VAL-STYLE-004 is fulfilled.
